title: cx-cli configuration
description: Schema for cx CLI project configuration files used by the cx tooling.

$schema.description: JSON schema URL for editor validation.

configFile.description: Path to the repomix configuration file.

outputStyle.description: Default output format for repomix generation.

outputDir.description: Default directory where repomix outputs are written.

sections.description: Optional named repomix sections for componentized output generation.

anyOf.description: Single include pattern or path for the section.
List of include patterns for the section.
Named section with explicit include paths.

name.description: Optional section name used for output file names.

include.description: Required file include patterns for this section.

bundle.description: Bundle metadata settings for cx bundle operations.

outputDir.description: Directory where bundle metadata is written.

createZip.description: Whether to create a ZIP archive after bundling.
